title: Publish Zephyr boot wins and failures
description: Aggregate project-LICHEN-m5m1 evidence after all execution issues complete. Record every result in Beads as WIN, FAIL, or BLOCKED, run three independent coverage/evidence reviews, verify AWS cleanup, and close only when counts reconcile with the manifest.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Final counts reconcile with the canonical manifest. 2. Every WIN cites an independent runtime oracle. 3. Every FAIL/BLOCKED row links a remediation or dependency Bead. 4. Three independent reviews find no omitted firmware or unsupported proof claim. 5. All temporary AWS resources are gone and persistent EBS is available/unattached. 6. Epic notes contain concise wins/fails and evidence locations.
notes:
AUTHORITATIVE PUBLICATION SUMMARY. Source: base HEAD 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364 plus scoped source fingerprint documented in m5m1.8 (27-path binary diff SHA-256 14c7c8ee5c770ab53aa822dd78e77b4f8b150f56a5d654bbf027313250d38741; eight-untracked digest 9a9761d536ab99a0dcadef0b69c0c75e416f43642cf595b9d82396b389f73fcb). ROOTS: 42 total = 39 WIN and 3 BLOCKED. Tests: 37 roots/62 scenarios = 35 WIN roots/60 passing scenarios plus app_identity and ping_l2 BLOCKED. Production/sample target rows: 42 total = 9 WIN, 18 FAIL, 15 BLOCKED. Bridge 16 = 2/12/2; gateway 10 = 2/2/6; puck 11 = 2/4/5; lora_ping 4 = 3/0/1; test_blink 1 = 0/0/1. WIN ORACLES: passing ztests for test roots; late application plus protocol/L2 markers for bridge/gateway/puck; boot/config/TX plus independent lichen-sim transmission count for lora_ping. EVIDENCE: ARM Twister reports at /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1 with hashes in m5m1.5; production/lora evidence at /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/lichen-m5m1-nine-runs-20260716T1800Z, 104-entry SHA256SUMS manifest SHA-256 a49d5fd7b6a9d47f064f5d13fb6ffad902be5d2948f11d25274ee834ddb8c7ef. Every FAIL/BLOCKED links a concrete remediation/dependency Bead in m5m1.8. Three independent final arithmetic/evidence/remediation reviews found no issues. REMAINING ACCEPTANCE BLOCKER: AWS cleanup must verify temporary builders gone and persistent EBS vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb available/unattached.
AWS CLEANUP VERIFIED in account 210337117346, us-west-2. Both authorized Project=LICHEN/LaunchedBy=opencode-session builders terminated: i-03d978911e97d4350 (lichen-m5m1-builder) and i-0b9423e5181dd9066 (lichen-m5m1-x86-native). Before termination, /mnt/lichen-zephyr was synced and unmounted, vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb was explicitly detached, and the volume-available waiter succeeded. Final volume state: available, Attachments=[]; final filtered active opencode-session LICHEN instance list: [].
PUBLICATION ERRATA. Bridge WIN oracle is late startup only: Booting Zephyr OS plus main: ready; m5m1.7 explicitly does not claim SLIP, LoRa, or L2 protocol operation. Gateway/puck retain late application plus service/protocol oracles; lora_ping retains independent simulator TX; tests retain passing ztests. EXACT EIGHT-UNTRACKED FINGERPRINT: shasum -a 256 over lichen/apps/puck/boards/native_sim.conf, native_sim.overlay, native_sim_native_64.conf, native_sim_native_64.overlay; lichen/samples/lora_ping/boards/rak4631_nrf52840.conf, rak4631_nrf52840.overlay, t_echo_nrf52840.overlay; and lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/sections-ram.ld, piped through LC_ALL=C sort -k2 and shasum -a 256, yields 9a9761d536ab99a0dcadef0b69c0c75e416f43642cf595b9d82396b389f73fcb. Native32 remediation project-LICHEN-o4yi now requires provisioning and cleaning up a replacement x86 builder rather than restoring terminated i-0b9423e5181dd9066. REVIEW TRAIL: coverage review ses_093b63328ffe5lNcByADVUbUkY at publication time found no findings; evidence and cleanup reviews ses_093b63319ffeLmM772dFOa5QtI and ses_093b6330fffeoJWwabKzgL2z7j identified these three errata, which are corrected here; clean rerun IDs will be appended before closure.
FINAL CLEAN REVIEW TRAIL: coverage ses_093b63328ffe5lNcByADVUbUkY; evidence/provenance ses_093a02e14ffeM6RYFVZwj3dORy; AWS cleanup/remediation ses_093a02de5ffei9X0L1hHKRtq0S. All three independently returned no findings after final errata. Authorized temporary security group sg-0643ba702993e88b4 was deleted and independently verified InvalidGroup.NotFound; no m5m1/Project-tagged temporary security groups or builder ENIs remain.
FINAL PUBLICATION TAXONOMY ERRATUM: authoritative root counts are 42 = 39 WIN, 2 FAIL, 1 BLOCKED. app_identity and ping_l2 are reproducible software/firmware FAILs on valid Native64 backends; test_blink is the sole BLOCKED root due unavailable authorized T1000-E physical execution. Test scenarios are 62 = 60 WIN, 2 FAIL, 0 BLOCKED. Production/sample target rows remain 42 = 9 WIN, 18 FAIL, 15 BLOCKED.
TAXONOMY REVIEW TRAIL: ses_09398a4d7ffeEHvKvSE07KBLGA, ses_09398a4c8ffe9m96r6NDln117N, and ses_09398a4bfffeAFgfymhWyOme9h independently confirmed 39 WIN/2 FAIL/1 BLOCKED roots and 60 WIN/2 FAIL/0 BLOCKED test scenarios with no findings.
close_reason: Republished corrected taxonomy with three independent clean reviews: software crashes are FAIL, unavailable physical execution is BLOCKED.
